summary: Same Fox News BREAKING NEWS clip as the related post: aerial LA operation footage plus Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons in an interview box discussing a ramming incident and assaults on officers. A straight cable-news segment, not produced entertainment or music-driven, so out of scope.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; BREAKING NEWS: U.S. MARSHAL AND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SHOT DURING LOS ANGELES IMMIGRATION OPERATION; Todd Lyons, Acting I.C.E. Director
